papers.authors: Arnel I. Smith, Elly Do, Chao Chen
papers.evidence: 自适应无矩阵低秩近似可直接用于低秩去噪方法
papers.tldr: 在无矩阵环境下，矩阵或算子仅能通过矩阵向量乘积访问，且需自适应确定秩以满足误差容限。本文提出一系列自适应无矩阵随机化QB算法，包含随机误差指示器直接从草图中估计残差范数，以及秩剪步骤将计算块大小与最终秩解耦。在奇异值多样衰减的测试中，所得秩接近截断SVD最优，并以高概率满足预设容差。该工作为无矩阵低秩近似提供了高效、自适应的通用框架。
papers.abstract_en: We study fixed-tolerance low-rank approximation in the matrix-free setting, where a matrix or linear operator $\mathbf{A}$ is accessible only through matrix-vector products and its rank must be determined adaptively to meet a prescribed error tolerance. We introduce a family of adaptive, matrix-free randomized QB algorithms. A randomized error indicator estimates the residual norm -- in either the Frobenius or the spectral norm -- directly from a random sketch, remaining accurate down to machine precision. A matrix-free rank-pruning step decouples the computational block size from the final rank, so that large, BLAS-3-friendly blocks can be used without over-estimating the rank, and an adjoint-free variant returns the orthonormal basis using only the forward operator. Across test matrices with diverse singular-value decays, the proposed methods attain ranks close to the truncated-SVD optimum while meeting the prescribed tolerance with high probability.
